intent: Single-screen SEPA payment form: recipient, IBAN with Mod-97 checksum, optional BIC, amount, reference, execution date and submit-to-SCA action.
notes: Tier-1 banking baseline (PSD2/SEPA): one screen with six fields (Empfaenger, IBAN, BIC, Betrag, Verwendungszweck, Ausfuehrungsdatum) and a single primary action that hands off to the strong-customer-authentication step. Mix of mandatory, optional and format-restricted rules; one numeric field with 2-decimal rounding constraint; one ISO-date field with a today lower bound. No navigation target on the submit button because SCA is modeled as an out-of-band side-effect, not a screen.
